english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
At Tin – The Fig

By the fig and the olive,
At Tin – The Fig

by Mount Sinai,
At Tin – The Fig

and by this secure town:
At Tin – The Fig

arabic text: لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ فِي أَحْسَنِ تَقْوِيمٍ
english translation text:
We certainly created man in the best of forms;
At Tin – The Fig

then We relegated him to the lowest of the low,
At Tin – The Fig

arabic text: إِلَّا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ فَلَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍ
english translation text:
except those who have faith and do righteous deeds. There will be an everlasting reward for them.
At Tin – The Fig

So what makes you deny the Retribution?
At Tin – The Fig

Is not Allah the fairest of all judges?
At Tin – The Fig
